allow: Bash(mysql -u root avian-wms-ga -e "SELECT id, code, label, qr_code, blok, grup, kolom, baris, is_active FROM cells WHERE blok=2 AND grup='A' AND kolom=2 AND baris=5 LIMIT 5;")
Bash(mysql -u root avian-wms-ga -e "SELECT id, code, label, qr_code, blok, grup, kolom, baris FROM cells WHERE blok IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;")

Bash(mysql -u root avian-wms-ga -e "SELECT c.id, c.code, c.qr_code, c.blok, c.grup, c.kolom, c.baris, r.code as rack_code FROM cells c JOIN racks r ON r.id = c.rack_id WHERE c.blok IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.id LIMIT 15;")
